title: Verify engagement section shows similar genre content after 90% consumption
description: Test that after user reaches 90% consumption, Engagement section shows top 1 content in similar genre
preconditions: User has active trial with consumption >= 90% on acquired content

steps.description: 1. Log in with trial user who has consumed >=90% of acquired content

expected_result: Engagement section shows top 1 content in similar genre to acquired content, with trailer autoplay if not started
